assertions.assertion: Test with role=admin claims asserts HttpStatusCode.NoContent (204)
Test with role=viewer claims asserts HttpStatusCode.Forbidden (403)
Test with no claims (unauthenticated) asserts HttpStatusCode.Unauthorized (401)
assertions.rationale: No-auth test sets Claims = null and asserts HttpStatusCode.Unauthorized

assertions.assertion: Each test sets distinct claims via the TestClaimsProvider before making the request
assertions.rationale: Uses static FakeAuthHandler.Claims property, not a TestClaimsProvider interface

assertions.assertion: Uses IClassFixture<T> or equivalent to share the WebApplicationFactory across tests
assertions.rationale: Creates a new TestFactory instance per test instead of using IClassFixture<T>
